hints.text: Chinese SAR (counts as China); coverage only **Gen2** — some of the **oldest**, extra washed-out & overexposed (a tell in itself)
Plates **black with white text**, long or square

shared_with.diff: Singapore = crisp modern coverage; Macau = old Gen2.

hints.text: Cylindrical grey lamp posts with **black-painted bottom**

shared_with.note: HK's similar lamp posts lack the black bottom.

hints.text: **Portuguese + Chinese** on storefronts and signs (colonial history)
White street signs w/ **blue border** around Chinese + Portuguese text
**Casinos & gambling ads** everywhere (50% of GDP), extravagant kitsch buildings — many still under construction in the old coverage
**North**: dense apartments, gridded narrow streets, cars parked both sides; **south**: hilly rural winding roads w/ trees — few clues, use the washed-out Gen2 + lamp posts
**Bridges**: Sai Van = cuboid towers with arches; Amizade = red guardrails
